title: Traveling Salesperson Problem
description: Interactive visualization of the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) demonstrating random routes, nearest neighbor heuristic, and 2-opt optimization using vis-network.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Traveling Salesperson Problem
TSP
Optimization
NP-Hard
Graph Algorithms
Heuristics
Route Planning
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of traveling salesperson problem
Explore traveling salesperson problem through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of traveling salesperson problem to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on traveling salesperson problem
